title: Revert to md2man master
body:
Upstream md2man is working again.  We can revert to using it instead
of a specific commit id.

Also, add make integration.CentOS for testing

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Actually, this seems to be missing the revert of the md2man changes @baude 

The integration changes look fine though
